image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if 10,000 hours of practice isn’t the key to expertise?
Context visual: The popular myth claims mastery comes from sheer repetition, but science paints a different picture.
Escalation visual: Studies show quality of practice matters more than quantity—think deliberate, focused efforts.
Evidence visual: Experts recommend feedback and reflection over mindless hours spent grinding.
Payoff visual: So, don’t just count the hours—make each one meaningful. That’s the real secret to mastery.
Cta visual: Curious about more myths in learning? Hit like and subscribe!
